head.title: LucidKit – Protect Your Bids
head.description: LucidKit is a reliable service for protecting and managing your bids. We create secure and efficient solutions for your business.

welcome_page.heading: LucidKit — your trusted partner in the world of bidding.
welcome_page.description: Here you'll find tools and solutions for secure bid management.

signin.heading: Sign in to LucidKit
signin.subheading: Analyse car photos and detect hidden defects before purchase
signin.forgot_password_sent: If an account with this email exists, we sent a password reset link
signin.magic_link_sent_description: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
signin.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes or use "Forgot password?"
signin.session_revoked: Session ended. Please sign in again
signin.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again

recovery.title: Account deactivated
recovery.description: Your account was deleted on {date}. It will be permanently removed in {days} days.

verify.error_description: The sign-in link you used is no longer valid. Please request a new one.

auth.magic_link_sent: A sign-in link has been sent to your email

auth.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
auth.invalid_magic_link: The link is invalid or has expired

generic.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes
generic.internal_error: Something went wrong. Please try again later
generic.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again later
